name: Kloesschensuppe/ Little Dumpling Soup (Oberl
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter, salt, and water together until boiling.
2. Add all the flour at once and stir until the dough cleans the pan.
3. Allow to cool.
4. Combine the beaten egg with the dough mixture, then add the Parmesan and chopped parsley.
5. Form into small dumplings using two teaspoons.
6. Heat the beef stock and gently poach the dumplings for about 5 minutes.
7. Serve.
